principle: Set fixed min and max height on cards in a grid and truncate overflowing text with ellipsis to maintain visual uniformity
explanation: X.ux|card_consistency: dynamic_content -> varying_card_heights -> broken_grid_rhythm; fix: fixed_min_max_height + text-overflow:ellipsis + overflow:hidden + white-space:nowrap (single_line) OR display:-webkit-box (multiline); optional: tooltip_for_full_text; NO:cards_with_unrestricted_height_in_grid NO:text_breaking_card_boundaries eg: "card_h:auto_title_wraps_3_lines" >> "card_min-h:200px + title_max_2_lines + ellipsis"

principle: Crop all images in a card grid to the same dimensions and aspect ratio to maintain visual rhythm
explanation: X.ux|card_images: varying_image_sizes_in_grid -> broken_rhythm + chaotic_layout; fix: uniform_dimensions + aspect_ratio + object-fit:cover; all_cards_same_image_height; NO:images_with_different_heights_in_same_grid NO:uncropped_images_stretching_cards eg: "product_grid: img_h:120px + img_h:240px + img_h:180px" >> "all_product_images: aspect-ratio:4/3 + object-fit:cover + w:100%"
